info.title: Coda External API
info.summary: API for screenplay authoring and project-scoped source breakdown data.
info.description: Breakdown routes accept project-bound API keys and MCP tokens. Screenplay routes require a signed-in browser session and do not accept project-scoped bearer credentials. Mutating screenplay requests also require the CSRF cookie and matching X-Coda-CSRF header. This document intentionally excludes setup, account, session administration, instance administration, membership, role, invitation, ownership-transfer, workspace-layout, project import, trash, and purge operations.

servers.description: The Coda instance that issued the credential.

tags.name: Project
tags.description: Read or update the bound project.

tags.name: Screenplays
tags.description: Create, edit, import, and export owner-authored Fountain screenplays.

tags.name: Schema
tags.description: Manage hierarchy levels and custom fields.

tags.name: Items
tags.description: List, create, edit, order, and populate breakdown items.

tags.name: Source
tags.description: Upload files and attach source-page references.

tags.name: Collaboration
tags.description: Work with comments and the project activity feed.

get.summary: List screenplays owned by the signed-in user

post.summary: Import Fountain source as a screenplay

201.description: Created from a .fountain, .spmd, or .txt filename. The source text is preserved exactly.

get.summary: Get the bound project and hierarchy

delete.summary: Remove an empty deepest hierarchy level

get.summary: List custom fields for a hierarchy level

put.summary: Set or clear a typed field value

post.summary: Verify and complete a direct upload
Attach an uploaded PDF as the project source
Attach a source page range to an item

patch.summary: Update a comment authored by the credential owner

get.summary: Download one hierarchy level as CSV
Download the active project model as JSON

bearerAuth.bearerFormat: Coda API key or MCP token
bearerAuth.description: Use an API key by default. When using an MCP token, also send `X-Coda-Token-Audience: mcp`.

sessionCookie.name: coda_session
sessionCookie.description: Browser session cookie. Screenplay routes do not accept project-scoped bearer credentials.

csrfCookie.name: coda_csrf
csrfCookie.description: CSRF cookie required for mutating session-authenticated requests.

csrfHeader.name: X-Coda-CSRF
csrfHeader.description: Must exactly match the coda_csrf cookie.

ParentIdQuery.name: parentId
ParentIdQuery.description: Filter by parent. Use an empty value for root items; omit to include all parents.

Filters.name: filters
Filters.description: A URL-encoded JSON array of typed field filters. At most 20 filters.

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid session or bearer credential, including revoked, expired, or wrong-audience bearer credentials.

Forbidden.description: The credential lacks the required permission, or a session-authenticated mutation failed CSRF validation.

NotFound.description: The resource does not exist or is not accessible to the caller.

Conflict.description: The resource version is stale or a domain invariant would be violated.

meta.description: Pagination or response metadata when present.

sourceText.description: The canonical UTF-8 Fountain source text.

position.description: Opaque fractional rank. Do not edit directly.
Opaque fractional rank. Do not edit directly.
Opaque fractional rank. Do not edit directly.
Opaque fractional rank. Do not edit directly.
Opaque fractional rank. Do not edit directly.

x-coda-contract-generation.queryParameters: Documented manually and checked against listItemsQuerySchema behavior; OpenAPI cannot express the JSON-encoded filters query directly.
x-coda-contract-generation.responses: Documented stable public fields; response schemas are not generated from runtime serializers.
